name: vn-textify
title: VN Textify
description: Transform Vietnam's Telex text to Vietnamese text
author: locnguyen1842

commands.name: vntelex-transform
commands.title: Transform Vietnamese Telex
commands.description: Transform Vietnam's Telex text to Vietnamese text

preferences.name: customSkipWords
preferences.title: Custom Skip Words
preferences.description: Comma-separated words to skip during Telex transformation. Merged with built-in list.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
